productDisplayName: Lotto Men L500 FG White Sports Shoes
description: Style Note Get ready to score goals in style with these lotto Fuerzapura II L500 FG men's soccer cleats. The lightweight structure enables better ball control. Ultra-durable and lightweight, these cleats are designed for quick moves on the field and enhanced performance.  Product Details White and yellow shoe with central lace-ups, overlays and perfortations on either sides of the mouth and tongue Smooth tongue and inner Lightweight puntoflex outsole, reactive arch at the midfoot and soccer cleats Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
